title: git's –end-of-options Flag
summary: 本文介绍了Git中'--'（end-of-options）标志的用法，用于明确区分选项和参数，避免歧义。作者通过示例展示了在文件名以'-'开头或包含特殊字符时，使用'--'可以确保Git正确解析。该标志在脚本和自动化中尤为重要，能防止意外行为。文章还提及了其他命令中类似用法，强调了这一POSIX标准特性在提高命令行稳健性方面的价值。
summary_en: This article explains the usage of the '--' (end-of-options) flag in Git, which disambiguates options from arguments. It demonstrates how using '--' prevents issues when filenames start with '-' or contain special characters, ensuring correct parsing. The flag is crucial in scripts and automation to avoid unexpected behavior. The article also notes similar usage in other commands, highlighting the value of this POSIX standard feature for robust command-line operations.
